regions.text: We get knowledge in different ways--through our senses, through talk with other men,
through the work we do with our hands and our heads, and through books. These are all ways of getting knowledge.
Knowledge is very important. It is important in itself. And it is important as a way to other things. A man who has no knowledge is of no use to other men.
Is the word "use" part of your knowledge of English? (See page 219.) Knowledge gives us light. It makes things clearer to us.
